title: CCL - During  Call - Settings are locked
scenario: Close Conversation Limiting settings are locked and greyed out during an active call in Device Settings > Advanced
steps: 2. Navigate to Home screen and tap on the connected [Device Name].
4. Verify that Close Conversation Limiting (CCL) settings are visible.
5. Place an active call using the connected Poly Bluetooth device.
6. During the active call, return to Poly Studio Mobile → [Device Name] → Device Settings → Advanced.
8. Tap on any CCL option (e.g., On, Off, or a specific level).
expected: CCL settings should be adjustable during an active call, or if intentionally locked, the dialog should clearly explain why and allow override if appropriate.
